title: Amazon Basics Heavy Duty Retractable Auto-Load Ergonomic Utility Knife 3-Position Locking Blade with 4 Replaceable Blades in Designed Storage, Black/Silver
features: Professional quality: Heavy duty zinc-alloy utility knife with SK5 blade and rubber anti-slip cushion grip handle

Fully retracting and locking: Retractable and adjustable blade slides open to 3 different blade lengths for exact cuts and easily retracts to lock safely when not in use; extra blades store easily inside body of knife

Easy change and quick release: Just extend the blade, press the button and reverse or switch. Comes with 4 heavy duty reversible high carbon SK5 blades with replacement designed storage built inside body of knife
Best for general and precision cutting: Slice through cardboard, carpet, drywall, rope, vinyl, leather, flooring, and wood; use for box cutting, arts and crafts
description: From the manufacturer Amazon Basics utility knife, heavy-duty, rubber handle, retractable blade, 3-stage, with lock, incl. 4 spare blades With the durable rubber-handled utility knife from Amazon Basics, you'll have a reliable blade at your fingertips for a variety of projects. This dependable tool features a retractable blade that adjusts to 3 different positions for precise trimming when needed. Ideal for everyday use such as opening boxes, arts and crafts projects, and special projects that require cutting of carpet, drywall, vinyl and other heavy-duty materials. Zinc alloy utility knives for DIY projects and general uses Non-slip rubber handle 5 SK5 blades total Retractable blade with 3 adjustable lengths Quick release mechanism and safety lock Durable zinc alloy construction Whether it's for a family camping trip or home renovations, the Amazon Basics utility knife comes in handy for many tasks. With a robust zinc alloy construction and a total of 5 SK5 blades (1 already installed, 4 available as spares for later), this knife is built for dependable longevity and durability. Non-slip handle and multiple blade positions Thanks to the non-slip, pleasantly soft rubber handle and the quick-release function, you can work confidently and effortlessly with the universal knife from Amazon Basics. Enjoy precision cuts and an easy safety lock to protect against accidental injury when not in use. You can adjust the retractable blade to 3 different positions depending on your project needs, each of which securely lock.
